DEPT. 206, ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-22-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFFS SAM AND BERNICE PALMA'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF 12/16/04 @ 1:30PM IN DEPT. 206 IS VACATED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 11/8/04; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 10/29/04 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED OUT FOR TRIAL. 1)DEFENSE MEDICAL EXAM SHALL BE CONDUCTED AT THE CONVENIENCE OF PLAINTIFF WITHIN THE NEXT 3 WEEKS NEAR HIS HOME. 2) PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION SHALL BE TAKE WITH 2 WEEKS. 3) IF PLAINTIFF BERNICE PALMA MAINTAINS HER LOSS OF CONSORTIUM CLAIM-SHE SHALL BE DEPOSED WITHIN 30 DAYS. COUNSEL STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE SHORTENED TIME ON MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONDERO; CLERKS: D. BOFFI & V. MU; REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
